output.dependency: The text in the second column appears to identify the flight route entry shown in the third column; both rows share the same route-style code while the first column changes to different source/site labels, suggesting the route code determines the flight route meaning.

The route-style flight code is associated with time-of-day values, with the same route code appearing alongside the same departure and arrival times in both samples; this suggests the route entry may determine or be linked to the scheduled times.
